title: euphorbia cotinifolia subsp. cotinifolia
intro: Euphorbia cotinifolia subsp. cotinifolia, also known as the red leaf euphorbia or firestick plant, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). It is native to the West Indies and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing skin irritations. Euphorbia cotinifolia subsp. cotinifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as tinctures, salves, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
